info.title: WHO PreQual Product Ingredient API
info.description:
Logical model for product ingredient details
from the WHO PreQual API (ProductIngredients).

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-PreQualProductIngredient
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-PreQualProductIngredient.

StructureDefinition-PreQualProductIngred.title: WHO PreQual Product Ingredient
StructureDefinition-PreQualProductIngred.description:
Logical model for product ingredient details
from the WHO PreQual API (ProductIngredients).

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for PreQualProductIngredient logical model

ingredientType.description: Ingredient type code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. VxFVP)

productComponentType.description: Product component type code from PreQualDatabaseMetadata (e.g. Diluent)
